DISCOVERY 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MARIN OUTDOOR LIVING, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING INDEPENDENT PSYCHIATRIC EXAMINATION - THE COURT WILL SIGN DEFENDANT'S PROPOSED ORDER WITH RESPECT TO LENGTH OF EXAMINATION AND SUBJECTS COVERED EXCEPT THAT SEXUAL HISTORY IS EXCLUDED IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S STIPULATION. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE DATE OF THE EXAMINATION AND LIMITATIONS ON THE OVERBROAD PATIENT REGISTRATION FORM. THE COURT WILL NOT INCLUDE THE CANCELLATION FEE IN THE ORDER WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IF PLAINTIFF DISOBEYS THE ORDER COMPELLING HER ATTENDANCE ON THE DATE CHOSEN. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE : PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
JOINDER OF DEFENDANTS ECOSMART, INCORPORATED AND THE FIRE COMPANY PTY LTD'S In DEFENDANT Marin Outdoor Living, Incorporated's Motion For An Order Authorizing An Independant Psychiatric Examination. THE COURT WILL SIGN DEFENDANT'S PROPOSED ORDER WITH RESPECT TO LENGTH OF EXAMINATION AND SUBJECTS COVERED EXCEPT THAT SEXUAL HISTORY IS EXCLUDED IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S STIPULATION. THE COURT WILL NOT INCLUDE THE CANCELLATION FEE IN THE ORDER WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IF PLAINTIFF DISOBEYS THE ORDER COMPELLING HER ATTENDANCE ON THE DATE CHOSEN.
